name: subfolio-astro
description: Subfolio reimagined as an Astro static site — a folder on disk becomes a themeable web gallery, no database, content authored by file-naming conventions.

scripts.dev: node scripts/gen-thumbs.mjs && node scripts/gen-css.mjs && node scripts/gen-rss.mjs && astro dev
scripts.start: node scripts/gen-thumbs.mjs && node scripts/gen-css.mjs && node scripts/gen-rss.mjs && astro dev
scripts.build: node scripts/gen-thumbs.mjs && node scripts/gen-css.mjs && node scripts/gen-rss.mjs && astro check && astro build
